resources.string: Type any emoji to react with.
Something paired contacts see when they tap your name.
Armed. Open the app to reset the timer.
Generate a one-time link to share. Best if you\'re meeting in person.
Got their invitation link? Scan their QR or paste below.
Joining a group — no nickname needed; the group name
Pair via SimpleX — exchange a one-time link out-of-band
Show this QR to them, or share the link.
They see you as a random handle too — your real name stays
They sent you a link or QR. Scan or paste here.
They\'ll see you as a random handle — your real name stays
How long without opening Aegis before the canary fires.
I haven\'t checked in for a while.
If you don\'t open Aegis within the configured window,
Sent verbatim to every paired contact when the canary fires.
Automatically turn off the group module after a
No groups yet. Tap + New group to create one,
Public groups increase your attack surface. Group
Removes the group and its message history from this device.
Shield paused · messages and SOS suspended
Tap here or the hex button below to share an invite link or scan a QR code.
A random alias, unique to this contact — each person you
Group this contact under a label on the chat list.
Local only — they don\'t see what you call them.
No data received yet — waiting for the first status ping.
On success, their phone is locked and located.
One label per contact. Determines what they receive.
Removes the contact, every message in your 1:1
This person will be able to locate, lock, and wipe your
Detects a vehicle crash from a hard impact while you\'re
Lock did not fire on target — Device Admin not enrolled.
This is the last step before the factory reset fires.
This triggers a FULL FACTORY RESET on the target.
A hard throw/grab/yank fires SOS to your contacts.
Detect a vehicle crash and fire SOS after a 30s “I\'m OK”.
These features are unfinished, may drain battery,
Restore from a previous backup, or start fresh.
Set a circular zone around your current location. When you leave
Aegis requires unlock on launch and after backgrounding.
After too many wrong PINs, permanently erase data.
Biometric login is convenient but skips duress
Deletes the PIN entirely AND removes the duress PIN if
Draw a pattern to unlock instead of typing your PIN.
Entering this PIN opens a decoy profile that looks like
Fast, convenient — but it skips duress: a forced
How long after backgrounding before the app re-locks.
Maximum security: your encryption key is never stored on
Require recovery phrase on every reboot
Shuffles digit positions on every unlock to defeat shoulder-
When off, Aegis opens directly. Your PIN is still required
Each profile is a complete, isolated Aegis on the
Pick a short id (letters, digits, - _) — visible
SOS alerts only fire to the family of the
These 24 words are the ONLY key to this profile\'s data.
This conversation will be stored on disk and KEPT. It stops
Your current profile stays protected in the background
Mutes chat notification sounds during the configured window.
Enter your 24-word recovery phrase, separated by spaces.
Recovered. Set a new PIN to lock Aegis.
No SOS recipients. Promote at least one contact to
Plays at maximum alarm volume until you
Duress mode active. Some panels are hidden to preserve the cover.
Your living shield. Each hex is a protection feature; lit hexes are armed, dim hexes are gaps. Tap to configure.
Advanced: override the default SMP servers.
Auto-burn TTL applied to new chats. Existing chats keep their own.
Auto-revoke unused 1:1 invite links after a set time.
Encrypted file backup — data survives uninstall.
Health probes, driver reloads, connection log, debug overlay.
Multiple isolated Aegis profiles on this device — switch between families.
Mute chat notifications at night. SOS still wakes you.
Performance / Balanced / Power saver + per-effect toggles.
Press-and-hold Send / Call / Video to fire. Prevents accidental triggers.
Read-only inventory of every shipping behaviour.
Rearrange the bottom tabs. SOS stays centred.
Stops screenshots, screen recording, and the
Unfinished features hidden behind the 7-tap gate.
WiFi-only by default — APKs are ~45–65 MB each.
When the SIM in this phone changes, an alert is sent
Aegis polls GitHub every 24 hours for new builds.
How often Aegis polls GitHub for a new build. Lower wakes the
The system installer will open. You may need to
Entering this PIN at the vault gate opens a hidden
No screenshots. No copy. No trace once closed.
Recipient sees a fire icon. Opening triggers a one-time
Device Admin: enable in Settings \u2192 Security \u2192 Device Admin Apps.
Live status. Green = active. Dim = needs permission.
Auto-burn messages in this chat after the chosen period.
Deletes every message in this conversation on this device. The other side keeps theirs.
Emergency contact. They receive SOS alerts only. No routine sharing.
Pick when to send. Aegis polls every minute or so
Force-reset individual subsystems without restarting the app.
How much data Aegis has moved.
Kills the Aegis process and relaunches it. In-flight
Nothing is sent anywhere and nothing can be recovered.
Subsystems shut off as battery drops, in order. Threshold next
This is irreversible. It wipes this device back to a
Wipe all Aegis data — erase everything on this device and
No paired contacts yet. Pair someone first
All visual effects below are forced off while the
Faint repeating hex pattern behind every screen.
Scan line + data rain transparency. Lower if
Show the chibi mascot on splash, empty screens, About,
Single cyan line crawling top to bottom every 30 s.
Tiny hex particles drifting downward. Heaviest of the three.
Removes the group and its message history from this device.
A short note shown to every member — what this
Anonymous — the group sees a random handle, never your
Auto-burn messages in this group after the chosen period.
Every paired contact is already in this group.
Groups are always incognito. Your real profile stays in
Make sure the photo doesn\'t show you or where you are
No members yet. The host\'s bot and other members
Off / 1 min — 1 year. Applies to messages sent in this group.
Removes the group locally and tells the host you\'re gone.
When the window elapses without you
You\'ll stop receiving messages from this group. The host
The same documents that ship with the source — bundled in
Send, voice call and video call buttons require a press-and-hold
A 1:1 invite link stays usable on the relay until
Aegis is available in 17 languages. You can change this
Aegis is built on technologies that have already protected
Proof your safety net works — each badge is earned the
Set your name and an optional photo. Paired contacts see
Must start with smp:// and include a host.
Power-user setting. The defaults run on infrastructure
Every note, photo, video, and file in the vault — both
No forensic payload attached for this stage.
No sentinel events yet. When a contact who has you on
No events logged. Arm Sentinel and trigger some
Adjust per device — speakers vary up there. Anything
Automatically arms Sentinel when the phone is
Contacts who receive silent SimpleX pings when
Fires ONE audible 200 ms 1 kHz beep and measures
Hearing audible clicks? Drop this. The speaker
If you hear clicks, it\'s your phone speaker — most
Log-only — record events locally, never notify
Lower = more sensitive. Compare against the live Δ
No contacts yet — add some to enable notifications.
Place the phone where you want it to listen,
stop sonar first — calibrate needs exclusive audio access
stop sonar first — self-test needs exclusive audio access
Visible to every paired contact for 24 hours, then auto-deleted.
Always at the middle slot. Can\'t be moved.
SOS stays in the centre — too important to move.
Aegis is free forever. No ads. No tracking. No data sold.
Aegis will open without asking for anything. Your PIN still
Anyone who sees these words owns your account
Biometric login is convenient but skips duress protection.
Each node unlocks a new layer of protection.
If it ever helps you, you can support Project Aether any
It is your master key, shown once. We never store it and
Left to right along the bottom of every screen:
Make sure no one is watching and nothing is recording your
SOS stays locked in the centre. You can reorder the rest
This encrypts your messages and recovers your account if
This is the ONLY copy. We keep nothing. There is no
You can replay this tutorial from Help at any time.
Your messages and attachments are encrypted under this PIN.
Your PIN is set and always works — it\'s what duress and remote
Couldn\'t fetch the safety code. SimpleX may still be initialising — try again in a few seconds.
Welcome to Project Aether. I\'m Cyan — I\'ll be your guide.
No phone number. No account. No server stores your messages. Just cryptography.
If you\'re ever in danger, one button alerts everyone you trust.
Harden your phone one step at a time.
Five tabs run along the bottom. Here\'s what each one does.
PIN is the safest. Add a faster way if you like — your PIN always stays.
You\'re ready. Add a contact to get started.
Zero metadata — no profile, no contact graph
Hold the SOS button 1 second — or tap power ×4
GPS, audio, and camera broadcast to your contacts
SOS alerts only — no daily data.
Settings, your identity, app lock, and updates.
Your security skill tree — harden the phone step by step.
The big one. Hold to alert everyone you trust.
Your encrypted chats. Message your contacts here.
Live map — where your trusted contacts are, and who\'s online.
Type your PIN to unlock. Full duress + shoulder-surf protection.
Draw a pattern for daily unlock. Your PIN still covers duress.
Fast unlock. Note: biometric skips duress protection.
Open Aegis without unlocking. PIN still guards duress + remote access.
Your PIN locks Aegis and protects your duress profiles. Your recovery phrase is what encrypts your messages. 4–8 digits.
Your PIN unlocks Aegis and is the key your messages are
First things first. Set your app PIN.
Why Aegis asks for so much
Tap any one to allow it — or skip. I\'ll tell you exactly what each is for.

A safety app has to be able to act for you — find you, alert your people, run when your phone is asleep. That\'s why the list looks long. Tap a card to allow it now, or grant it later when a feature needs it. Nothing leaves your phone without you.

The most important one. Lets Aegis keep running when it\'s closed or your screen is off, so messages and SOS alerts still arrive. Without it your phone can quietly stop delivering them — especially on OnePlus, Xiaomi and Oppo phones.

Your %1$s phone has extra battery controls that can kill Aegis in the background. Open this setting and make sure Aegis is allowed to auto-start and run in the background — otherwise messages and SOS alerts may silently stop arriving.
To alert you to messages, calls, and SOS — even on your lock screen.
So your trusted contacts can find you in an emergency, and your SOS can share where you are. (Background location is granted separately in settings, for when the screen is off.)
For SOS photos, a mugshot if someone enters your duress PIN, and video calls.
For SOS audio capture and voice / video calls.
To send and save attachments in your chats. Aegis only ever sees what you choose to share.
To warn you if your SIM is swapped — a common sign someone has hijacked your number.
Bluetooth, for finding nearby people and devices (Radar and Sonar).
So Aegis can update itself securely, without an app store that could track who you are.
You stay in control. Skip any of these and most of Aegis still works — but background activity is the one that keeps the safety features alive.
You can enable this later — tap to open Settings.
